destinations.evidence: Prepared fulfilled-async settlement data stores settlement_calldata_gas computed from settlement_tx.input(), not the u64::MAX EVM gas limit.
Payload gas-fit accounting subtracts prepared.settlement_calldata_gas, and system settlement execution contributes calldata gas to block gas accounting.

equivalence_argument: The v2 port no longer exposes the old PreparedBundle::estimated_gas name, but the same consensus accounting is implemented by carrying settlement_calldata_gas from calculate_calldata_gas(settlement_tx.input()) into payload gas-fit checks and system transaction gas contribution.
notes: The unlimited settlement EVM gas limit is not used for block gas fit; calldata gas is the block accounting contribution.
rationale: The primary diff replaces settlement_tx.gas_limit() in estimated_gas with ritual_async_fees::calculate_calldata_gas for FulfilledAsyncPair and DeliverySettlement variants, matching the commit body's explanation that settlement gas_limit is u64::MAX and was causing all fulfilled async transactions to fail the pre-execution gas limit check. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: PreparedBundle::estimated_gas must use calculate_calldata_gas(settlement_tx.input()) for async settlement and delivery settlement system transactions, rather than settlement_tx.gas_limit(), because those transactions use u64::MAX as an unlimited EVM execution gas limit but only calldata gas contributes to block gas accounting.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create a FulfilledAsyncPair and a DeliverySettlement whose settlement_tx.gas_limit() is u64::MAX and whose input has known calldata gas; assert PreparedBundle::estimated_gas returns effective_gas plus calldata gas for the pair and calldata gas for the delivery settlement, and remains below a normal block gas limit.
summary: Settlement gas accounting uses settlement calldata gas.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create a FulfilledAsyncPair and a DeliverySettlement whose settlement_tx.gas_limit() is u64::MAX and whose input has known calldata gas; assert PreparedBundle::estimated_gas returns effective_gas plus calldata gas for the pair and calldata gas for the delivery settlement, and remains below a normal block gas limit.
title: Settlement estimates use calldata gas
